THE COURT WILL ALSO EXECUTE RESPONDENT'S PROPOSED ORDER PERTAINING TO SEALING PORTIONS OF THE OPPOSITION AND PETITIONER'S PROPOSED ORDER PERTAINING TO SEALING PORTIONS OF THE REPLY. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Evette D. Pennypacker, Esq. of Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP, Tel. 650.801.5025, for petitioner and moving party;
Kelly A. Woodruff, Esq. and Morgan Jackson, Esq. of Farella Braun + Martel LLP, Tel. 415.954.4400 for respondent and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. PETITIONER CATALINA MARKETING CORP'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. The Court will execute the proposed judgment submitted by Petitioner Catalina Marketing Corp. with the following modifications: (i) The first sentence of paragraph 2 at page 2, line 6 will read "Respondent shall implement the relief set forth on pages 56-57 of the Corrected Final Award and Exhibit A attached thereto."; (ii) The words "PERMANENT INJUNCTION" at line 10 of page 2 are deleted; (iii) The words "this Judgment" at line 18 on page 2 are replaced with "the Corrected Final Award"; (iv) the paragraph number headings at line 18 - 22 on page 2 are corrected to be 1 through 4; and (v) there will not be an exhibit to the Judgment. Respondent has not established that the recordkeeping procedure set forth in the proposed judgment as so stated is confidential. The parties will bear their own attorney fees. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JUDGMENT SIGNED AFTER HEARING.) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Motion And Motioan To Seal
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Evette D. Pennypacker, Esq. of Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP, Tel. 650.801.5025, for petitioner and moving party;
Kelly A. Woodruff, Esq. and Morgan Jackson, Esq. of Farella Braun + Martel LLP, Tel. 415.954.4400 for respondent.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. PETITIONER CATALINA MARKETING CORP'S Motion To Seal is granted pursuant to CRC 2.550(d). The Court will execute Petitioner's Proposed Order. The Arbitrator ruled that the arbitration should remain confidential. (Declaration of Kelly A. Woodruff, Ex. 4, Order no. 18, p. 2.) The Court will also execute Respondent's proposed order pertaining to sealing portions of the Opposition and Petitioner's proposed order pertaining to sealing portions of the Reply. RESPONDENT'S ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (PETITIONER'S ORDER SIGNED AFTER HEARING.) Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Sheryl L. Sawyer CSR# 5976.
